memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-05-29 — Midday (Mid-Morning Silent Failure)

Mid-Morning did NOT fire (no heartbeat). Pre-Market also missed today = 2 violations May 29. Market-Open confirmed executed with AMD/MU/MRVL attempts (all blocked). PLTR mandatory entry deferred to Midday catch-up — also blocked.

**MU +4.1% to $961.11 at Midday:** MU surged intraday from $923.52 prev close. Prior limit $928.14 is now $32.97 below market. Mandatory update: $965.91. This is the 3rd consecutive session MU has made a significant move while our intended order remained unplaced. Compounding opportunity cost: if filled at $923.52 and now at $961.11, we'd have +$37.59/share × 5sh = +$187.95 unrealized gain TODAY ALONE.

**Pre-Market AND Mid-Morning both failing on same day:** This is the 2nd time we've had multiple same-day failures. Pattern: the cron scheduler is unreliable for intraday sessions (Pre-Market 8AM, Mid-Morning 11AM). Only Market-Open (9:45 AM) and Midday (12:30 PM) appear to be firing with some regularity. The schedule is effectively: Market-Open + Midday + one of (Afternoon, Market-Close, or Daily-Review). Operator should monitor for Afternoon and Market-Close sessions.

**MRVL gap-fill pattern holds (from May 28):** MRVL intraday range today $199.20-$208.76. The $202.19 limit order (if placed) would have filled — low was $199.20. Confirming the gap-fill thesis: MRVL is now trading $3-5 ABOVE our intended limit entry. Another missed gain.

**API block day 23:** Unchanged root cause. No resolution in sight from cloud runner side. Manual execution remains the only path.
